title: The Phoenix Wheel returns to Bridge Street
summary: The world's oldest surviving Ferris wheel, built by the Phoenix Bridge Company in 1893, has been reassembled downtown as a permanent illuminated sculpture with interpretive signage and trail connections.

title: Street Cart Bagels working toward reopening after fire
summary: The Nutt Road bagel shop damaged by fire is hiring staff and says a reopening "won't be long," though no date is set yet.

title: 245-249 Bridge Street redevelopment proposed
summary: A plan before the borough would combine four parcels, demolish an existing mixed-use building, and expand from five to twenty apartment units.

title: Route 23 corridor safety work runs through November
summary: Safety improvements to eleven signalized intersections along Route 23 continue, with weekday closures at Bridge Street and Nutt Road (9 AM-3 PM) through November 20.
